entries.definition:
m–ʾ–y to exaggerate, to grow (said of trees), to come into leaf,
to become enlarged; to backbite; to mow; the number ‘hundred’.
Of this root, two forms occur 10 times in the Qur’an: مِائَة miʾatun
eight times and مِائَتَيْن miʾatayn twice.

مِائَة miʾatun [numerical n., dual مِائَتَيْن miʾatayn] hundred (8:66)
should there be a steadfast hundred

865
